title: Project Telos Twenty-Sixth Wave Owned Social Post Claims

claims.text: The twenty-sixth wave owned social post packet records the refreshed Project Telos tool snapshot for Index, Forum, Gather, Crucible, Telos, the Telos model-foundry lane, and the Telos creative-engine lane before drafting.
claims.falsification: The packet omits the refreshed tool snapshot or records versions/statuses inconsistent with the MCP status and Telos manifest checks.

claims.text: The packet provides exact text for 33 prepared owned-channel drafts across LinkedIn, X/Bluesky, Mastodon/Threads, Substack Notes, blog seeds, and profile updates.
claims.falsification: The packet contains fewer than 33 owned-channel draft entries or lacks coverage across the listed owned-channel platform classes.

claims.text: The short-form drafts satisfy the packet's conservative length rules: X/Bluesky drafts are under 280 characters, Mastodon/Threads drafts are under 500 characters, and LinkedIn drafts are under 3,000 characters.
claims.falsification: Any X/Bluesky draft exceeds 280 characters, any Mastodon/Threads draft exceeds 500 characters, or any LinkedIn draft exceeds 3,000 characters.

claims.text: The packet preserves the public side-effect boundary by marking all drafts as prepared but not posted and requiring exact action-time confirmation of platform, account, and exact text before posting.
claims.falsification: The packet claims the drafts were posted or authorizes posting without exact platform, account, and exact-text confirmation.

claims.text: The packet distinguishes owned-channel posting from third-party community comments by allowing the Project Telos repository link only in owned-channel drafts and retaining confirmation gates before any public submission.
claims.falsification: The packet treats owned-channel posts and third-party comments as the same dispatch class, removes the confirmation gate, or claims external public comments were submitted.
